summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Fernanda Loyola landing page. All sections render correctly, WhatsApp integration works perfectly, responsive design functions properly at 390px mobile width, and all specified features are implemented correctly.
passed_tests: Page title and meta description correct
Hero section renders with photo, name, overline, subtitle, and WhatsApp CTA
Hero WhatsApp CTA links to correct URL with phone 5521967647661
Para Quem section renders 3 cards with pastel backgrounds (lilac, pink, green)
Sobre section shows professional bio text
Como Funciona section shows 3 steps and lifestyle image on desktop
Atendimento Presencial section shows location info (Baixada Fluminense / Nova Iguaçu)
CTA Final section with WhatsApp button links correctly
Floating WhatsApp button is visible and links correctly
Page is responsive at 390px mobile width
All WhatsApp links contain correct phone number and pre-filled message
Color palette correctly implemented (purple, lilac, green, pink, beige)
Typography uses correct fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Manrope)
All data-testid attributes present and functional
Proper semantic HTML structure and accessibility features
